title: Urginavia porphyrantha
taxonomy: Urginavia porphyrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The classification of Urginavia porphyrantha includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Magnoliophyta, class as Liliopsida, and order as Asparagales. This plant is further classified into the family Iridaceae, genus as Urginavia, and species as U. porphyrantha. Further research is needed for more detailed classification information.
